name: @compn3rd/pi-web-pendant-theme
description: Pendant-inspired theme for PI WEB: Source Sans 3 body font, Press Start 2P pixel accents, sharp corners, flat surfaces, subtle pixel grid. Includes 6 dark variants (Amber CRT, Green Phosphor, Cyan/Teal, Nearly Monochrome, Muted Everything, plus the original) and a light variant.
